summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Lebville Boutique: 17/17 backend pytest cases PASS (health, products list/filter/sort/search/detail/categories, auth register/login/me/logout, brute-force lockout, orders with correct BWP shipping logic, DPO mock payment create/verify marking order paid, chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 + history persistence). Frontend E2E flow PASSED: Shop grid renders 20 products, category filter (clothing -> 14), search 'NORA' -> 6, product detail with BWP price, Add-to-cart opens drawer with correct subtotal, unauthenticated checkout redirects to /login, register + checkout + DPO mock payment -> /payment/return success, Orders page shows order with status 'paid', chatbot panel opens and AI replies.

integration_issues.issue: Problem statement expects Register -> /checkout when cart has items, but Register.jsx currently redirects to '/'. User must manually navigate to /checkout (which still works). Minor UX deviation, not blocking.

action_items: (Optional UX) On successful registration, if cart has items, redirect user to /checkout instead of / to match the spec. Login.jsx likely already handles this; replicate in Register.jsx.

(Console noise) /api/auth/me returning 401 on initial unauthenticated page load produces console errors. Consider suppressing error log for the 401 'not authenticated' case in AuthContext bootstrap (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS config correctly strips '*' when allow_credentials=True and adds FRONTEND_URL explicitly — good.
auth.py uses bcrypt ($2b$), httpOnly+secure+samesite=none cookies, brute-force lockout at 5 attempts / 15 min, seed_admin is idempotent & updates password if changed — matches auth playbook.
Orders: shipping_cost computed free over BWP 1000 else 50, status pending_payment, currency BWP — verified.
Payment mock returns redirect_url to /payment/return with MOCK- token and verify transitions order to 'paid' — verified.
Chat endpoint persists to chat_messages collection and history endpoint returns messages — verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% core flows (shop list/filter/sort/search, product detail, cart, auth-gated checkout, register, checkout submit, DPO mock, orders list, chatbot)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@lebville.com / Lebville@2026 (seeded). Test customer dynamically registered each run (email includes timestamp + uuid).
seed_data_creation: Tests dynamically register per-run unique customers and create orders; 20 products are auto-seeded by server startup if collection empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_lebville_api.py covers health, products, auth (+lockout), orders, payment (mock), chat. Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_lebville_api.py -v. Frontend testids of note: product-card-<slug>, add-to-cart-btn (NOT add-to-bag), cart-item-<id>, cart-checkout-btn, filter-cat-<name>, shop-search + shop-search-btn (search uses Go button not live-filter), ship-address (field name is address_line on backend), chatbot-toggle/chatbot-panel/chatbot-input/chatbot-send/chat-msg-assistant. DPO mock flow: POST /api/payment/create -> redirect_url contains MOCK- token; /payment/return auto-calls verify and marks order paid.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found. The only UX gap is Register.jsx not redirecting to /checkout when cart is non-empty (spec wanted this). Fix: in Register.jsx after successful register, mirror Login.jsx logic — if cart length > 0 or location state has from=/checkout, navigate('/checkout') instead of navigate('/').
